rationale.remediation-gating: Budget decay provides bounded retries to prevent indefinite cycling during autonomous fixing.
rationale.ai-review: The Apollo agent independently evaluates completed milestones and issues verdicts.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Verification demands concrete evidence like CI results and test outputs.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Dashboard streams agent reasoning and tool calls for human comprehension.
rationale.framework: Proposes TheBotCompany, an open-source orchestration framework.
rationale.built-system: Implemented as a working system and evaluated on real-world projects.
rationale.agentic: AI autonomously executes multi-day development tasks at the milestone level.
rationale.steering: Managers dynamically hiring and firing specialized worker agents is a contribution.
